# content

```go
import "github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/internal/content"
```

Package content detects a file's real media type from its magic bytes, independent of its filename or extension. It wraps gabriel\-vasile/mimetype behind a small, config\-agnostic API.

## Index

- [type Info](<#Info>)
  - [func Detect\(path string\) \(Info, error\)](<#Detect>)


<a name="Info"></a>
## type [Info](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/blob/main/internal/content/content.go#L13-L17>)

Info is the detected MIME information for a file.

```go
type Info struct {
    Full string // full type without parameters, e.g. "image/png"
    Type string // top-level type, e.g. "image"
    Ext  string // canonical extension without the dot, e.g. "png" ("" if unknown)
}
```

<a name="Detect"></a>
### func [Detect](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/blob/main/internal/content/content.go#L20>)

```go
func Detect(path string) (Info, error)
```

Detect reads the leading bytes of the file at path and returns its MIME info.
